sql.trim: t1.DATA_11, t1.DATA_10, t1.DATA_12, t1.REQUEST_USER, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.ANNEX, t1.DEPT_TWO_NAME, t1.HONOR_ORGAN, t1.NATION, t1.DEPT_ONE_ID, t1.DEPT_THREE_ID, t1.DATA_1, t1.DATA_2, t1.DATA_3, t1.SKILL_LEVEL, t1.DATA_4, t1.ID, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.BIRTHDAY, t1.CREATED_BY, t1.DATA_9, t1.DEPT_ID, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.DATA_5, t1.EDUCATION_LEVEL, t1.DATA_6, t1.AUTO_CODE, t1.DATA_7, t1.DATA_8, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.DEPT_THREE_NAME, t1.PROFESSIONAL_RANK, t1.POLITICAL_OUTLOOK, t1.MODEL_LEVEL, t1.SPECIALITY, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.MODEL_COMPANY, t1.REQUEST_USER_ID, t1.DEPT_NAME, t1.SEX, t1.MODEL_COUNTRY, t1.MODEL_ECONOMIZE, t1.DEPT_TWO_ID, t1.WORK_DATE, t1.HONOR_NAME, t1.CATEGORY_TYPE, t1.POST_NAME, t1.USER_CODE, t1.HONOR_FILE_NAME, t1.REQUEST_DATE, t1.VERSION, t1.APPOINTMENT_LEVEL, t1.TEL, t1.DEPT_ONE_NAME, t1.MODEL_CITY, t1.MODEL_NAME, t1.DATA_14, t1.HONOR_DATE,

mapper.select:
select
from DYN_TU_MODEL_WORKER t1
and t1.id in
#{item}
order by t1.creation_date desc
mapper.insert:
insert into DYN_TU_MODEL_WORKER
DATA_11,
DATA_10,
DATA_12,
REQUEST_USER,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
ANNEX,
DEPT_TWO_NAME,
HONOR_ORGAN,
NATION,
DEPT_ONE_ID,
DEPT_THREE_ID,
DATA_1,
DATA_2,
DATA_3,
SKILL_LEVEL,
DATA_4,
ID,
CREATED_DEPT,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
BIRTHDAY,
CREATED_BY,
DATA_9,
DEPT_ID,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
DATA_5,
EDUCATION_LEVEL,
DATA_6,
AUTO_CODE,
DATA_7,
DATA_8,
CREATION_DATE,
DEPT_THREE_NAME,
PROFESSIONAL_RANK,
POLITICAL_OUTLOOK,
MODEL_LEVEL,
SPECIALITY,
ORG_IDENTITY,
MODEL_COMPANY,
REQUEST_USER_ID,
DEPT_NAME,
SEX,
MODEL_COUNTRY,
MODEL_ECONOMIZE,
DEPT_TWO_ID,
WORK_DATE,
HONOR_NAME,
CATEGORY_TYPE,
POST_NAME,
USER_CODE,
HONOR_FILE_NAME,
REQUEST_DATE,
VERSION,
APPOINTMENT_LEVEL,
TEL,
DEPT_ONE_NAME,
MODEL_CITY,
MODEL_NAME,
DATA_13,
DATA_14,
HONOR_DATE,
#{data11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{data10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{data12,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{requestUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{annex,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{deptTwoName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{honorOrgan,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{deptOneId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{deptThreeId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{data1,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{data2,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{data3,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{skillLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{data4,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{birthday,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{data9,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{data5,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{educationLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{data6,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{autoCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{data7,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{data8,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{deptThreeName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{professionalRank,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{politicalOutlook,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{modelLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{speciality,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{modelCompany,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{requestUserId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{deptName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{modelCountry,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{modelEconomize,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{deptTwoId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{workDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{honorName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{categoryType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{postName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{userCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{honorFileName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{requestDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{appointmentLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{tel,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{deptOneName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{modelCity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{modelName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{data13,jdbcType = BLOB},
#{data14,jdbcType = CLOB},
#{honorDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},

insert into DYN_TU_MODEL_WORKER( DATA_11 , DATA_10 , DATA_12 , REQUEST_USER , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , ANNEX , DEPT_TWO_NAME , HONOR_ORGAN , NATION , DEPT_ONE_ID , DEPT_THREE_ID , DATA_1 , DATA_2 , DATA_3 , SKILL_LEVEL , DATA_4 , ID , CREATED_DEPT , LAST_UPDATE_IP , BIRTHDAY , CREATED_BY , DATA_9 , DEPT_ID , LAST_UPDATED_BY , DATA_5 , EDUCATION_LEVEL , DATA_6 , AUTO_CODE , DATA_7 , DATA_8 , CREATION_DATE , DEPT_THREE_NAME , PROFESSIONAL_RANK , POLITICAL_OUTLOOK , MODEL_LEVEL , SPECIALITY , ORG_IDENTITY , MODEL_COMPANY , REQUEST_USER_ID , DEPT_NAME , SEX , MODEL_COUNTRY , MODEL_ECONOMIZE , DEPT_TWO_ID , WORK_DATE , HONOR_NAME , CATEGORY_TYPE , POST_NAME , USER_CODE , HONOR_FILE_NAME , REQUEST_DATE , VERSION , APPOINTMENT_LEVEL , TEL , DEPT_ONE_NAME , MODEL_CITY , MODEL_NAME , DATA_13 , DATA_14 , HONOR_DATE )
select #{item.data11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.data10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.data12,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.requestUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.annex,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.deptTwoName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.honorOrgan,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.deptOneId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.deptThreeId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.data1,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.data2,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.data3,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.skillLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.data4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.birthday,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.data9,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.data5,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.educationLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.data6,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.autoCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.data7,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.data8,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.deptThreeName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.professionalRank,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.politicalOutlook,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.modelLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.speciality,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.modelCompany,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.requestUserId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.deptName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.modelCountry,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.modelEconomize,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.deptTwoId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.workDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.honorName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.categoryType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.postName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.userCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.honorFileName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.requestDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.appointmentLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.tel,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.deptOneName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.modelCity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.modelName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.data13,jdbcType = BLOB} , #{item.data14,jdbcType = CLOB} , #{item.honorDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} from dual
mapper.update:
update DYN_TU_MODEL_WORKER
DATA_11 = #{data11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
DATA_10 = #{data10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DATA_12 = #{data12,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
REQUEST_USER = #{requestUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ANNEX = #{annex,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DEPT_TWO_NAME = #{deptTwoName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
HONOR_ORGAN = #{honorOrgan,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
NATION = #{nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DEPT_ONE_ID = #{deptOneId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DEPT_THREE_ID = #{deptThreeId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DATA_1 = #{data1,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DATA_2 = #{data2,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DATA_3 = #{data3,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
SKILL_LEVEL = #{skillLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DATA_4 = #{data4,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
BIRTHDAY = #{birthday,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DATA_9 = #{data9,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DEPT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DATA_5 = #{data5,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
EDUCATION_LEVEL = #{educationLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DATA_6 = #{data6,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
AUTO_CODE = #{autoCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DATA_7 = #{data7,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DATA_8 = #{data8,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
DEPT_THREE_NAME = #{deptThreeName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PROFESSIONAL_RANK = #{professionalRank,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
POLITICAL_OUTLOOK = #{politicalOutlook,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
MODEL_LEVEL = #{modelLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
SPECIALITY = #{speciality,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
MODEL_COMPANY = #{modelCompany,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
REQUEST_USER_ID = #{requestUserId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DEPT_NAME = #{deptName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
SEX = #{sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
MODEL_COUNTRY = #{modelCountry,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
MODEL_ECONOMIZE = #{modelEconomize,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DEPT_TWO_ID = #{deptTwoId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
WORK_DATE = #{workDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
HONOR_NAME = #{honorName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CATEGORY_TYPE = #{categoryType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
POST_NAME = #{postName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
USER_CODE = #{userCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
HONOR_FILE_NAME = #{honorFileName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
REQUEST_DATE = #{requestDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
VERSION = version+1,
APPOINTMENT_LEVEL = #{appointmentLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TEL = #{tel,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
DEPT_ONE_NAME = #{deptOneName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
MODEL_CITY = #{modelCity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
MODEL_NAME = #{modelName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DATA_13 = #{data13,jdbcType = BLOB},
DATA_14 = #{data14,jdbcType = CLOB},
HONOR_DATE = #{honorDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update DYN_TU_MODEL_WORKER set DATA_11 = #{data11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , DATA_10 = #{data10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_12 = #{data12,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , REQUEST_USER = #{requestUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ANNEX = #{annex,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DEPT_TWO_NAME = #{deptTwoName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , HONOR_ORGAN = #{honorOrgan,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , NATION = #{nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DEPT_ONE_ID = #{deptOneId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DEPT_THREE_ID = #{deptThreeId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_1 = #{data1,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_2 = #{data2,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_3 = #{data3,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SKILL_LEVEL = #{skillLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_4 = #{data4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , BIRTHDAY = #{birthday,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_9 = #{data9,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DEPT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_5 = #{data5,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , EDUCATION_LEVEL = #{educationLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_6 = #{data6,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , AUTO_CODE = #{autoCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_7 = #{data7,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_8 = #{data8,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , DEPT_THREE_NAME = #{deptThreeName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PROFESSIONAL_RANK = #{professionalRank,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , POLITICAL_OUTLOOK = #{politicalOutlook,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MODEL_LEVEL = #{modelLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SPECIALITY = #{speciality,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MODEL_COMPANY = #{modelCompany,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , REQUEST_USER_ID = #{requestUserId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DEPT_NAME = #{deptName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SEX = #{sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MODEL_COUNTRY = #{modelCountry,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MODEL_ECONOMIZE = #{modelEconomize,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DEPT_TWO_ID = #{deptTwoId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , WORK_DATE = #{workDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , HONOR_NAME = #{honorName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CATEGORY_TYPE = #{categoryType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , POST_NAME = #{postName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_CODE = #{userCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , HONOR_FILE_NAME = #{honorFileName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , REQUEST_DATE = #{requestDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , APPOINTMENT_LEVEL = #{appointmentLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TEL = #{tel,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , DEPT_ONE_NAME = #{deptOneName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MODEL_CITY = #{modelCity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MODEL_NAME = #{modelName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_13 = #{data13,jdbcType = BLOB} , DATA_14 = #{data14,jdbcType = CLOB} , HONOR_DATE = #{honorDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update DYN_TU_MODEL_WORKER set DATA_11 = #{item.data11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , DATA_10 = #{item.data10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_12 = #{item.data12,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , REQUEST_USER = #{item.requestUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ANNEX = #{item.annex,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DEPT_TWO_NAME = #{item.deptTwoName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , HONOR_ORGAN = #{item.honorOrgan,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , NATION = #{item.nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DEPT_ONE_ID = #{item.deptOneId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DEPT_THREE_ID = #{item.deptThreeId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_1 = #{item.data1,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_2 = #{item.data2,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_3 = #{item.data3,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SKILL_LEVEL = #{item.skillLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_4 = #{item.data4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , BIRTHDAY = #{item.birthday,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_9 = #{item.data9,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DEPT_ID = #{item.deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_5 = #{item.data5,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , EDUCATION_LEVEL = #{item.educationLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_6 = #{item.data6,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , AUTO_CODE = #{item.autoCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_7 = #{item.data7,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_8 = #{item.data8,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , DEPT_THREE_NAME = #{item.deptThreeName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PROFESSIONAL_RANK = #{item.professionalRank,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , POLITICAL_OUTLOOK = #{item.politicalOutlook,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MODEL_LEVEL = #{item.modelLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SPECIALITY = #{item.speciality,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MODEL_COMPANY = #{item.modelCompany,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , REQUEST_USER_ID = #{item.requestUserId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DEPT_NAME = #{item.deptName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SEX = #{item.sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MODEL_COUNTRY = #{item.modelCountry,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MODEL_ECONOMIZE = #{item.modelEconomize,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DEPT_TWO_ID = #{item.deptTwoId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , WORK_DATE = #{item.workDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , HONOR_NAME = #{item.honorName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CATEGORY_TYPE = #{item.categoryType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , POST_NAME = #{item.postName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_CODE = #{item.userCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , HONOR_FILE_NAME = #{item.honorFileName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , REQUEST_DATE = #{item.requestDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , APPOINTMENT_LEVEL = #{item.appointmentLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TEL = #{item.tel,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , DEPT_ONE_NAME = #{item.deptOneName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MODEL_CITY = #{item.modelCity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MODEL_NAME = #{item.modelName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_13 = #{item.data13,jdbcType = BLOB} , DATA_14 = #{item.data14,jdbcType = CLOB} , HONOR_DATE = #{item.honorDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{item.version}

mapper.select: select count(dtm.model_level) as "value", case dtm.model_level when '1' then '国家级荣誉' when '2' then '省部级荣誉' when '3' then '地市级荣誉' when '4' then '公司级荣誉' end as "name" from dyn_tu_model_worker_f dtm group by dtm.model_level order by dtm.model_level
select count(*) as "count" from dyn_tu_model_worker dtm

with psua as ( select case when TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY')-TO_CHAR(dtm.BIRTHDAY,'YYYY')) <= 35 then '小等于35' when TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY')-TO_CHAR(dtm.BIRTHDAY,'YYYY')) >35 and TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY')-TO_CHAR(dtm.BIRTHDAY,'YYYY')) <= 50 then '35-50' when TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY')-TO_CHAR(dtm.BIRTHDAY,'YYYY')) >50 then '大于50' end as name from dyn_tu_model_worker dtm ) ,psub as ( select count(psua.name) as val ,psua.name as name from psua where psua.name is not null group by psua.name ) select psub.val as "value",psub.name as "name" from psub
select count(dtm.EDUCATION_LEVEL) as "value", dtm.EDUCATION_LEVEL as "name" from dyn_tu_model_worker dtm group by dtm.EDUCATION_LEVEL order by dtm.EDUCATION_LEVEL
select count(dtm.PROFESSIONAL_RANK) as "value", dtm.PROFESSIONAL_RANK as "name" from dyn_tu_model_worker dtm group by dtm.PROFESSIONAL_RANK order by dtm.PROFESSIONAL_RANK
select count(dtm.CATEGORY_TYPE) as "value", dtm.CATEGORY_TYPE as "name" from dyn_tu_model_worker dtm group by dtm.CATEGORY_TYPE order by dtm.CATEGORY_TYPE
select count(dtm.DATA_1) as "value", dtm.DATA_1 as "name" from dyn_tu_model_worker dtm group by dtm.DATA_1 order by dtm.DATA_1
